div.head: The Secretary of State to the Ambassador in Brazil (Caffery)
div.p: 2210. On June 24 the Department, through an aide-mémoire to the Brazilian Embassy,See footnote 35, p. 494. invited the Brazilian Government to participate in informal exploratory talks on post-war civil aviation. To date no reply has been received.

Anything that you can discreetly and informally do to expedite acceptance of this invitation and the commencement of the talks at an early date will be helpful.Ambassador Caffery in telegram 2826, August 9, 1944, reported that he had, on the previous day, made inquiries of the Brazilian Minister of Air, who stated that his principal officers had under study the proposed exploratory talks on postwar civil aviation (711.3227/8–944).
